---
title: "Check models performance"
format: html
editor: visual
---

In order to apply SEM analysis, we must make severals choices. The attached script present the analysis and associated results which help us to take the necessary decisions.

## Load package and data
```{r}
invisible(Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "C"))
invisible(lapply(c("tidyverse", "lubridate", "ade4", "piecewiseSEM", "performance", "lme4", "slider", "purrr", "MuMIn"),require,character.only = TRUE))


# Fauna data
data_sem_raw <- read.csv("../output/SEM_database.csv", sep = ",", na.strings = c("", "NA"))%>%
  mutate("hum" = hum_soil,
         "temp" = temp_soil,
         "root" = root_growth_cm2_count,
         "fauna" = all_taxa,
         position=as.factor(position))
data_sem_raw$date <- ymd_hms(data_sem_raw$date, tz = "UTC")

# taxa list 
fauna_vars <- readLines("../output/fauna_vars.txt")

# microclimate index 
microclimate_index <- readLines("../output/microclimate_index.txt")
```


## Check SEM
```{r}
# Générer et stocker les modèles
window_days <- 20       
step_days   <- 1      
missing_data_rate <- 0.5
# run_sem_for_taxon doit retourner la liste de modèles en plus du tibble résumé
run_sem_for_taxon_full <- function(taxon_var,
                                   data_indices,
                                   microclimate_index,
                                   window_days = window_days,
                                   step_days   = step_days,
                                   missing_data_rate = missing_data_rate) {
  
  message("Running SEM for taxon: ", taxon_var)
  
  data_sem <- data_indices %>%
    mutate(
      fauna = !!sym(taxon_var),
      microclimate_index_1 = !!sym(microclimate_index[1]),
      microclimate_index_2 = !!sym(microclimate_index[2])
    ) %>%
    select(date, position, orientation, depth,
           fauna, root,
           microclimate_index_1, microclimate_index_2) %>%
    mutate(depth = as.factor(depth))
  
  # Rolling windows par position
  windows_list <- data_sem %>%
    group_by(position) %>%
    group_map(~ create_rolling_windows(.x, window_days, step_days),
              .keep = TRUE)
  
  names(windows_list) <- unique(data_sem$position)
  
  sem_fit <- function(data) {
    psem(
      lme(root ~ microclimate_index_1 + microclimate_index_2,
          data = data,
          random = ~1 | orientation/depth,
          correlation = corAR1(form = ~1 | orientation/depth)),
      
      lme(fauna ~ microclimate_index_1 + microclimate_index_2 + root,
          data = data,
          random = ~1 | orientation/depth,
          correlation = corAR1(form = ~1 | orientation/depth)),
      
      microclimate_index_1 %~~% microclimate_index_2
    )
  }
  
  results_list <- list()
  
  for (pos in names(windows_list)) {
    for (window_name in names(windows_list[[pos]])) {
      data_window <- windows_list[[pos]][[window_name]] %>% drop_na()
      if (nrow(data_window) / (window_days * 16) < missing_data_rate) next
      
      mod <- tryCatch(sem_fit(data_window), error = function(e) NULL)
      
      if (!is.null(mod)) {
        results_list[[paste(taxon_var, pos, window_name, sep = "_")]] <- list(
          model = mod,
          time_window_start = window_name,
          position = pos,
          taxon = taxon_var
        )
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Générer un tibble résumé des coefficients
  extract_results <- function(model_name, model_info) {
    sm <- summary(model_info$model)
    coef_table <- as.data.frame(sm$coefficients)
    
    p_clean <- coef_table$P.Value %>%
      as.character() %>%
      stringr::str_replace("<", "") %>%
      as.numeric()
    
    tibble(
      model_name = model_name,
      taxon      = model_info$taxon,
      position   = model_info$position,
      time_window_start = model_info$time_window_start,
      response   = coef_table$Response,
      predictor  = coef_table$Predictor,
      estimate   = coef_table$Estimate,
      se         = coef_table$Std.Error,
      df         = coef_table$DF,
      t_value    = coef_table$t.value,
      p_value    = p_clean
    )
  }
  
  summary_tbl <- map2_dfr(names(results_list), results_list, extract_results)
  
  list(
    summary = summary_tbl,
    models  = results_list
  )
}


# Générer tous les modèles pour tous les taxa

results_all <- purrr::map(fauna_vars, ~ run_sem_for_taxon_full(
  taxon_var = .x,
  data_indices = data_sem_raw,
  microclimate_index = microclimate_index,
  window_days = window_days,
  step_days = step_days,
  missing_data_rate = missing_data_rate
))

# Rassembler les tibbles résumés et les modèles
summary_all <- map_dfr(results_all, "summary")
# Rassembler tous les modèles dans une seule liste
models_all <- results_all %>%
  map("models") %>%     # liste de listes
  unlist(recursive = FALSE)  # transformer en une seule liste plate


# Sélection aléatoire d'un modèle par taxon × position
random_model_names <- summary_all %>%
  distinct(taxon, position, model_name) %>%
  group_by(taxon, position) %>%
  slice_sample(n = 1) %>%
  pull(model_name)

selected_models <- models_all[random_model_names]


# Évaluation des modèles sélectionnés
all_performance_checks <- map(selected_models, function(psem_obj) {
  lme_models <- purrr::keep(psem_obj$model, ~ inherits(.x, "lme"))
  map(lme_models, ~ performance::check_model(.x))
})

all_performance_checks[[6]][[2]]


```
